purpose: Edge/failure-mode fixture for the deterministic exclusion pass (detection.md). Proves tools/exclusion_pass.py classifies every category correctly + counts honestly (R8 — no silent skip). Scanned tree = repo/. The gate runs with --max-lines 50 so the 60-line data_big.txt trips oversize without a huge committed file (real defaults: >1MB or >20k lines).

monorepo_scope.note: with --scope packages/core, everything outside that package (incl. src/* and packages/extra) becomes out_of_scope — the component-scoped path.
